description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly dark gray mesh upper with orange accents and a white, segmented rubber sole. The shoe has a breathable mesh construction with synthetic overlays for added structure and durability. The collar and tongue are padded and lined with a light gray fabric for comfort. The side of the shoe displays a stylized logo in orange, while the heel and tongue also feature branding elements. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat gray laces. The overall design suggests a lightweight, flexible, and supportive shoe suitable for urban walking or running.
description: A dark gray athletic sneaker with orange accents, white segmented sole, and mesh upper, featuring visible branding and a standard lacing system.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the orange logo on the heel, gray upper, and the white segmented sole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the orange side logo, mesh texture, and the full length of the white segmented sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the lacing system, toe mesh, and padded tongue with branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mesh upper, orange accent line, and the sole's profile.
attribute_logo: Orange 'C' logo on heel and tongue, stylized side logo in orange
